3333000.name: BOTO LABO
3333000.description:
About BOTO LABO

In BOTO LABO you'll find a total of 100 levels, waiting to be solved in your own style!

BOTO LABO is not your typical Sokoban or Puzzle game where the main character takes all the credit when completing each level. Boto, the protagonist of the game, will need the help of their robot friends (also known as Mibo) to reach the flag!

You'll find yourself moving Boto around the laboratory to arrange all the different Mibos and elements, so that when everything looks good to you, just give the command and watch all the Mibos move to try and reach the flag!

Features

  • Rearrange the different Mibos and elements you will find on each level.

  • Look out for two or more Mibos looking at each other! They get scared easily and will turn around to the opposite direction.

  • Deactive or activate walls that the Mibo's encounter by having one of them click one of the level's button.

  • Make Mibo get special effects when stepping onto special tiles.

  • In Boto's laboratory you'll also find cats, dogs, birds, bonsais... and many more! Interact with the elements you will find in BOTO LABO to discover different kinds of interactions.

  • Collect the golden gear that you can find on every level while testing your skills to complete the levels with a different approach!

  • Discover an incredible OST where the background themes match with the sound effects generated by every element present on each level.

  • Play it vertically or horizontally, adjust the different sound effects, vibration of the game and even the IU opacity to adjust your experience! To each their own!

  • BOTO LABO's will implement a better and more advanced version of Tap&Hold, allowing everyone to play the game with only one input!

  • Make Boto stretch as much as you want! One step? Ten? Infinite!! Stretch Boto and watch them reach every tile on the level while moving around the leaf on their head.
